title.en: All the time, his strength is skyrocketing.

content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body is transforming, his cultivation is breaking through, and his strength is sublimating.

All the time, his strength is skyrocketing.

This kind of improvement is a bit more exaggerated than the previous two breakthroughs, after all, this is a transformation from the first level of the Eternal Realm God Realm to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm~!

Therefore, the increase in strength is naturally exaggerated-.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai truly completed his transformation and officially became a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Moreover, every time he broke through, he broke through by condensing the perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and the Eternal Dao Seed was also a Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, and every time he was promoted to the limit, he broke through.

Therefore, his current strength is extremely terrifying, and it is definitely no less than those Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak powerhouses who have condensed six Eternal Realm spirits.

In other words, he can now ignore the powerful Momen.

But compared to those top forces in the Eastern Wu Jieyu, he is not worth mentioning.

......

After the breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian replaced all the other copied bodies, so that each copied body was a mid-level cultivator in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian called his wife and children over and took out some Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal materials.

"This thing is for you, it is the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Substance, which is a supreme treasure for the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed Realm God, it can quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and the effect is very good, but it can't be given to the Realm God of the Non-Eternal Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise it will inevitably turn into a demon seed!" Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, father!"

"Thank you, husband!"

The three of them each received a copy of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal resources, and then went to retreat and refine.

When they absorbed the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, they were shocked to find that the effect was too good, much better than using the Eternal Demon Pillar to cultivate.

With the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Substance, they would definitely be able to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit in a short period of time, so that they could cultivate a second Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

Really.

It didn't take long for Xiao Yue to take the lead in raising the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, and then began to cultivate the Tianyan Gu Peng Inheritance Method to condense the Tianyan Gu Peng Realm Spirit.

And Ye Tian also gave some resources to assist in cultivating the Eternal Realm Spirit, which could ensure that Xiao Yue's breakthrough had a nearly 100% success rate.

When Xiao Yue broke through, Ye Tian guarded the whole process.

Little by little, time passed.

Not long after, Xiao Yue's body appeared with the aura of Tianyan Gu Peng, and it became more and more powerful.

Finally, Tianyan Gu Peng was completely condensed successfully, and then Xiao Yue's body began to transform, and his cultivation officially broke through a small realm, and his strength naturally skyrocketed.

Not long after Xiao Yue's breakthrough, her daughter Ye Xingyue also completed the breakthrough and condensed the second perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Tianyan Gu Peng.

After that, it was Ye Xingchen's turn to break through.

At this point, the three of them had all condensed the second Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, and their strength had soared significantly.

It's a pity that Ye Tian doesn't have any extra Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material in his hands, otherwise he will definitely be able to continue to raise their Eternal Dao Species to the limit in a short period of time, thus condensing the third perfect level Eternal Realm Spirit and reaching the peak cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

It is worth mentioning that after Ye Tian took out some of the resources in the Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins to assist in the solidification of the Eternal Dao Species, the number of half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms of the human race increased, and some of them quickly completed the solidification of the Eternal Dao Species.

According to this efficiency, it will not be long before the human race will give birth to the fifth Eternal Realm God Realm.

Sure enough, billions of solstice years later.

The fifth Eternal Realm God Realm was born, but this Eternal Realm God is also a descendant of Ye Tian, a grandson of Ye Xingchen, and Ye Tian's great-grandson, so he was naturally valued by Ye Xingchen, so he gave some more benefits in the cultivation process, plus his talent and heart were not bad, and he took the lead in completing the solidification of the Eternal Dao Species.

Perfect-level Eternal Dao Inheritance, the less the Terrans know, the better, otherwise Ye Tian would not be able to keep this inheritance now, and even the Terrans would be in danger.

After all, even those top forces don't have a perfect-level Eternal Dao Inheritance!

......

Ten billion years after the Dao era.

During this period of time, the human race gave birth to six Eternal Realm God Realms, including Lin Lei.

I have to say that Lin Lei's luck and talent are really good, he didn't get Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation at all, nor did he have the preferential treatment of the Ye family's people, but he forcibly surpassed a group of Ye family's half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms and successfully broke through to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm.

But after that, if the human race wants to cultivate the Eternal Realm God Realm, the efficiency will be much slower, after all, the resources that Ye Tian took out were almost exchanged.

"The number of Eternal Realms in the Endless Kingdom Alliance must exceed a thousand to become a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, so that a large number of resources within the Endless Realm Alliance will be bred, and more half-step Eternal Realm God Realms and Eternal Realm God Realms can also be cultivated. Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

He took out some Eternal Decrees and let some Eternal Dao Realm be exchanged, thus opening up one Eternal Realm after another.

Time passed, and one eternal kingdom after another was opened.

On this day, the number of Eternal Realms of the Endless Realms Alliance officially exceeded one thousand.

Rumble!!!!!

The entire Endless Realm Alliance began to burst out with endless light, and even in a very distant place in the Eternal Realm, the light here could be seen, representing that a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance was being born here.

At the same time, the Endless Kingdom Alliance also began to attract more demon seeds, and even one after another demon seed abyss projections were gradually born within the Endless Kingdom Alliance.

Ye Tian's duplicate body carried a batch of eternal national decrees and entered those demon seed abyss projections, opening up the eternal realm here, thus breaking the demon seed abyss projections.

Gradually, the abyssal projections of the demon seed were broken.

But the demon seed attracted by the outside world still needs to be confronted head-on.

Soon after, an Eternal Realm God descended from the Realm Court.

After all, a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance was born here, and the Realm Court naturally knew about it, so they were very curious!

After all, such a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, there was no trace of it before, so they naturally wondered, so they wanted to come and take a look.

Just when they arrived, Ye Tian appeared and met with them.
